data.body: DUPLICATE of bug a2c7-c9a9-ed63-4c5a ('verify-identity whole-store gate: 63-min CI runtime', CLOSED) — same era-check O(events×keyring×history) perf problem and same fix direction. The fix landed on main as commit 5ce636f21 'a2c7: verify-identity: batch era-verify commit resolution' (rebar-ticket: a2c7-c9a9-ed63-4c5a; reachable from HEAD). Evidence for each AC: (AC1) verify_authorship_at_commit (src/rebar/attest/authorship.py:430) now resolves keyring positions through a position_resolver backed by build_position_commit_map (authorship.py:354, single-pass --full-history) instead of per-key git-log; wired once in src/rebar/_commands/verify_authorship.py:563,599,238. (AC3) perf-safe regression test tests/unit/test_verify_identity_a2c7_perf.py is present and green; classifications/verdicts unchanged. (AC2) the wall-clock runtime restoration was validated under a2c7's closure. This ticket is superseded/duplicate. Closing.
